case_title: IRIS LOPEZ ET AL VS. PRISCILLA NAVAS ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-17-2022 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LOPEZ, IRIS DAVIS, KENYATT AS TO DEFENDANT NAVAS, PRISCILLA GREYSTAR HOLDINGS, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-17-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, IRIS DAVIS, KENYATT AS TO DEFENDANT NAVAS, PRISCILLA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-17-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-17-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF IRIS LOPEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF KENYATT DAVIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRISCILLA NAVAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GREYSTAR HOLDINGS INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA NAVAS (COMMUNITY MANAGER). PRISCILLA NAVAS IS DISMISSED AS NAMED DEFENDANT FROM THE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, IRIS DAVIS, KENYATT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREYSTAR HOLDINGS, INC $1,090.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,170.00, CASE AGAINST PRISCILLA NAVAS IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THE A/C COST IS SPLIT/DIVIDED BETWEEN THE PLAINTIFF/DEFENDANT. CARPET CLEANING IS DEDUCTED. THE BALANCE OF SECURITY DEPOSIT $840 IS RETURNED PLUS $250.00 FOR THE A/C UNIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
